understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels by moving selectable pieces onto goal tiles ('+' in the semantic grid). A level is won when every goal tile is occupied by a selectable piece simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) slide in the same direction if adjacent. Walls ('#' in semantic grid) block movement and can't be pushed. Some walls may be only partial or one-way, requiring experimentation. The player can switch control between selectable pieces using the CLICK action on a piece's pixel coordinates. The step budget is limited, and running out fails the level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels by moving selectable pieces onto goal tiles ('+' in the semantic grid). A level is won when every goal tile is occupied by a selectable piece simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) slide in the same direction if adjacent. Walls ('#' in semantic grid) block movement and can't be pushed. Some walls may be only partial or one-way, requiring experimentation. The player can switch control between selectable pieces using the CLICK action on a piece's pixel coordinates.
